---
title: "Beam Physics with Intense Space Charge"
subtitle: "USPAS 2026"
listing:
  type: table
  sort: false
  contents:
    - lectures/plasma/index.qmd
    - lectures/plasma/notes.qmd
    - notes/plasma.qmd
    - lectures/envelope/index.qmd
    - lectures/current-limits/index.qmd
    - lectures/halo/index.qmd
    - lectures/collision/index.qmd
    - title: "Transverse Equilibrium Distributions"
      author: Steve Lund
      path: "https://people.frib.msu.edu/~lund/uspas/bpisc_2020/lec_set_03/ted.pdf"
---
